creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
On Tue, Mar 06, 2001 at 09:47:00PM +0100, Anton Berezin wrote:
> New version:
> 
> - libesmtp is now at 0.5;
> - incorporate roam's suggestions to improve the port;
> - add a little bit of docs.

Just a minor comment..

> sed 's/^X//' >libesmtp/pkg-comment << 'END-of-libesmtp/pkg-comment'
> XlibESMTP - A Library for Posting Electronic Mail
> END-of-libesmtp/pkg-comment

portlint complains that this should begin with a capital; is it really
necessary to have the libESMTP in front?  How about just:
A library for posting electronic mail

G'luck,
Peter

-- 
You have, of course, just begun reading the sentence that you have just finished reading.
